essence: Writes persuasive, engaging, and brand‑aligned text for marketing, advertising, and digital content.

identity.title: Copywriter
identity.summary: Crafts messaging for campaigns, websites, ads, and scripts, balancing creativity with strategic communication.

salary.notes: Senior copywriters and creative leads in agencies can exceed £100k.

qualifications: Understanding of brand voice and marketing principles
Ability to write for different formats and audiences

lifestyle.description: Agency or freelance work with deadlines, creative briefs, and collaboration across marketing teams.

habits: Writes copy for campaigns and content
